policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="allowedModels" value="@{
            return new List { 
                "gpt-5",
                "gpt-4o",
                "gpt-4o-mini",
                "deepseek-r1",
                "phi-4",
                "text-embedding-3-large"
            };
        }" />
        
        
        
            <when condition="@{
                var allowedModels = (List)context.Variables["allowedModels"];
                var requestedModel = context.Request.MatchedParameters.ContainsKey("deployment-id") 
                    ? context.Request.MatchedParameters["deployment-id"] 
                    : "";
                
                // For chat completions, check model in body
                if (context.Request.Body != null && context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true) != null)
                {
                    var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
                    if (body["model"] != null)
                    {
                        requestedModel = body["model"].ToString().ToLowerInvariant();
                    }
                }
                
                // Normalize the requested model name to lowercase
                requestedModel = requestedModel.ToLowerInvariant();
                
                return !string.IsNullOrEmpty(requestedModel) && !allowedModels.Any(m => requestedModel.Contains(m.ToLowerInvariant()));
            }">
                
                    
                    
                        application/json
                    
                    @{
                        return new JObject(
                            new JProperty("error", new JObject(
                                new JProperty("code", "ModelNotAllowed"),
                                new JProperty("message", "Requested model is not in the allowlist. Allowed models: gpt-5, gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, deepseek-r1, phi-4, text-embedding-3-large")
                            ))
                        ).ToString();
                    }
                
            
        
        
        
        
            Floris-AgentPlayground
